summary: Completed comprehensive testing of UI Updates for Black Star Threads eCommerce - all features working correctly

issues: Some product images show unrelated stock photos (Nike sneakers, backpacks) instead of jersey images - this is a data/content issue, not a code issue

passed_tests: Announcement bar visible at top with 'FREE SHIPPING on orders over $100 | Use code GHANA10 for 10% off'
Menu shows simplified labels: Tournament | Streetwear | Fan | Retro | Designers
Search icon in header opens search input when clicked
Search submits and navigates to /products?search=query correctly
Footer has 'List Your Jersey' button with data-testid='footer-sell-btn'
Footer 'List Your Jersey' button links to /sell page
Footer has 'Company' section with Become a Seller, Terms & Conditions, Privacy Policy, Compare Jerseys links
Product cards show vendor name (e.g., 'ACCRA JERSEYS') above product name
Product cards have 2 images for hover effect
GET /api/products/{product_id}/check-vote endpoint works with device_fingerprint parameter
Voting stores device fingerprint in localStorage (bst_device_fp)
Voting prevented for users who already voted (by IP or fingerprint)
Vote count updates in real-time after voting
Vote button changes from 'Vote' to 'Voted' after voting
Toast notification shows 'Vote recorded! Thanks for voting.'
GET /api/products/top-voted endpoint returns top voted product
All 18 backend API tests passed (health, search, product details, voting, categories, vendor, newsletter)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All UI updates are working correctly: announcement bar, simplified menu (Tournament | Streetwear | Fan | Retro | Designers), search functionality, footer with 'List Your Jersey' button and Company section links, product cards with vendor name and hover effect, and enhanced voting system with device fingerprint. Backend tests are in /app/backend/tests/test_ui_updates.py. The voting system uses both IP and device fingerprint for duplicate prevention.
